nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Cantilupe was born in 1186, in England, her father, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, was 36 and her mother, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, was 24. She had at least 1 son with Thurstan de Montfort III. She died in 1220, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Cantilupe est née en 1186, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, avait 24 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Thurstan de Montfort III. Elle est décédée en 1220, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Cantilupe 1186 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe 36 und ihre Mutter Mesceline or Sibilla Braci 24. Sie hatte mit Thurstan de Montfort III mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1220 im Alter von 34 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Cantilupe è nata il nel 1186 nel England, sua padre, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, aveva 24 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Thurstan de Montfort III. Morì nel 1220, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Cantilupeが1186年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupeは36歳，母Mesceline or Sibilla Braciは24歳であった。彼女はThurstan de Montfort IIIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1220年にイギリスイギリスで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Cantilupe(이)가 1186년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mesceline or Sibilla Braci(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 Thurstan de Montfort III(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1220년 영국 잉글랜드에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Cantilupe nasceu em 1186, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, tinha 24 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Thurstan de Montfort III. Ela faleceu em 1220, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Cantilupe родилась в 1186 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, 24. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Thurstan de Montfort III. Она умерла в 1220 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Cantilupe nació en 1186, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Warwicksire de Cantilupe, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mesceline or Sibilla Braci, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Thurstan de Montfort III. Murió en 1220, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años.
